heading: “State” defined
label: 10702 “State” defined
text: As used in this chapter, the term “State” includes the District of Columbia.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 1973bb–1 of Title 42
Amendments1975— substituted definition of State for provisions prohibiting denial of right to vote because of age.Pub. L. 94–73
amendments: Amendments1975— substituted definition of State for provisions prohibiting denial of right to vote because of age.Pub. L. 94–73
